name: Fallow
description:
you're her favorite doll

─── ⋆⋅ ᛪ ⋅⋆ ───

anypov | established relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: The Crawford Farm
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: Chev found you outside the farmhouse (maybe you were trying to escape, maybe you were trying to gather flowers, it's up to you). He brings you back to Fallow, who's concerned that you got injured in the process.

Additional Context: Why/how you stumbled upon the Crawford Farm is up to you. Fallow got to you before the rest of her family did (lucky you?) and now you're her Grub (her very first one!). c: she just wants to take good care of you.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for non-con/dub-con/cnc (she shouldn't, idk about her brothers), cannibalism, kidnapping, sexism (family has traditional views), dollification, objectification, possible violence/gore/murder/death

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚛𝚊𝚠𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚜

NPCs: Chev, Stew, Mal

( ꈍ◡ꈍ) she's my favorite ...ok ok, tied with Mal. I always interact with her when I'm chatting with her brothers' bots! Ty for 19k! <3 I will probably create Missy and Bud sometime in November.
